login.description: Sign in using your official Católica SC e-mail.

errors.invalid_state: Sign-in session expired. Please try again.
errors.login_failed: Could not complete sign-in. Please try again.
errors.missing_params: Invalid response from the provider. Please try again.

twoFactor.title: Two-step verification
twoFactor.description: Enter the 4-digit code sent to your e-mail.

errors.invalid: Incorrect code. Please check and try again.
errors.expired: The code has expired. Request a new one.
errors.too_many_attempts: Too many attempts. Request a new code.
errors.no_code: No active code. Request a new one.
errors.invalid_challenge: Verification session expired. Please sign in again.

onboarding.unitQuestion: Which campus do you belong to?
onboarding.saveError: Could not save. Please try again.

home.templateTitle: Generate a document from a template
